query: SELECT se.id, se.productId, se.stationCode, se.eventType, se.categoryId, pc.categoryName, pc.brandName, se.createdAt, se.payload FROM station_events se LEFT JOIN product_categories pc ON pc.id = se.categoryId WHERE se.productId = 480063 ORDER BY se.id ASC;
